qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: An operating system uses shortest remaining time first scheduling algorithm for pre-emptive scheduling of processes. Consider the following set of processes with their arrival times and CPU burst times (in milliseconds): The average waiting time (in milliseconds) of the processes is ______.
